mapper.select: SELECT p.*, s.subject_name, t.real_name as teacher_name FROM exam_paper p LEFT JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON p.create_by = t.teacher_id WHERE p.paper_id = #{paperId}

SELECT p.*, s.subject_name, t.real_name as teacher_name FROM exam_paper p LEFT JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON p.create_by = t.teacher_id ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, s.subject_name, t.real_name as teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper_question pq WHERE pq.paper_id = p.paper_id) as real_question_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pq.score), 0) FROM paper_question pq WHERE pq.paper_id = p.paper_id) as real_total_score FROM exam_paper p LEFT JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON p.create_by = t.teacher_id WHERE p.create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, s.subject_name, t.real_name as teacher_name FROM exam_paper p LEFT JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.subject_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON p.create_by = t.teacher_id WHERE p.subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_paper (paper_name, subject_id, total_score, pass_score, duration, question_count, create_by, status) VALUES (#{paperName}, #{subjectId}, #{totalScore}, #{passScore}, #{duration}, #{questionCount}, #{createBy}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_paper SET paper_name = #{paperName}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, total_score = #{totalScore}, pass_score = #{passScore}, duration = #{duration}, question_count = #{questionCount}, status = #{status} WHERE paper_id = #{paperId}
